title: Hebbe Falls
tagline: Hebbe Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Hebbe Falls is situated at 13°32′29″N 75°43′30″E about 10 km away from the hill station Kemmangundi in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Hebbe Falls is situated at 13°32′29″N 75°43′30″E about 10 km away from the hill station Kemmangundi in Karnataka, India. The waterfall is inside a coffee estate.

topPlaces.name: Kalhattigiri Falls
topPlaces.description: Kalhatti Falls or Kalhattigiri Falls is a waterfall on the headwaters of the river, located at Kallathigiri, Tarikere Taluk in Chikmagalur district of Karnataka. The waterfall is 10 kilometers (6.2 mi) away from Kemmangundi hill station.

topPlaces.name: Kemmangundi
topPlaces.description: Kemmannugundi (Red Soil Pit) is a hill station in Tarikere taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in the state of Karnataka, India. It is at the elevation of 1434m above sea level, with its peak at 1863m.

items.note: Kalhatti Falls or Kalhattigiri Falls is a waterfall on the headwaters of the river, located at Kallathigiri, Tarikere Taluk in Chikmagalur district of Karnataka. The waterfall is 10 kilometers (6.2 mi) away from Kemmangundi hill station.
Kemmannugundi (Red Soil Pit) is a hill station in Tarikere taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in the state of Karnataka, India. It is at the elevation of 1434m above sea level, with its peak at 1863m.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hebbe Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hebbe Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hebbe Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (111 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hebbe Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hebbe Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hebbe Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Hebbe Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hebbe Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalhattigiri Falls, Kemmangundi.
